smoke.detail: sop kind: no code/env/smoke. README carries all gate-required sections (URL, INPUTS, OUTPUT FIELDS, LEDGER) plus SELECT with the 'ALL models' instruction, the full per-endpoint panel (organ incl. respiratory / eco / nutritional, 12 Tox21, 14 MIE, 15 off-targets, 6 metabolism targets), the no-substitute list, and the LD50 (mg/kg) non-comparability note vs ADMET-AI LD50_Zhu (F-5).

note: Web-only ProTox 3.0 SOP (tox.charite.de, no API/package); shortlist confirmatory. Documents SELECT=ALL models (default omits organ/AOP/off-target panel), the fields that have no automatable substitute, and F-5 LD50 non-comparability. Ledger shape matches core.ledger with source=ProTox 3.0 + run_by.
